meta.title: Benjamin Netanyahu Receives Hudson's Herman Kahn Award
meta.description: Prime Minister Netanyahu accepted the award during a gala ceremony at Manhattan’s Plaza Hotel, and participated in an extended on-stage conversation about Israel and its future with Roger Hertog, noted philanthropist and chairman of the Tikvah Fund.
